target: 22. Heine's Hometown
“?Month ?Day”
Uhh…
(This is… Heine's hometown…)
(…Right, where's Ushio!?)
…It cuts off ahead. The flow of time…
As Sou-sensei said, it's true…
Time here isn't flowing. It feels stagnant…
Even if we loop, it doesn't seem to return… If I die, probably that's all…

…This is bad…  
Ushioooooo!!
No response…!!

I had her…!!!  
With my own hands…!!.
Shinpei-san!!
Ryunosuke-san…!
Ushio-sa… She's definitely over here.
The shotgun she printed hasn't disappeared!
Right…!! 50 meters!!.
I can faintly sense a presence. But it's moving…
Oh… let's chase after her!!

…Ugh! ??
My legs…!!.
Shinpei-san!! I'm sorry… it's because of me that we flew away!
It was me who said to catch up with Shide at full speed! Compared to Nagumo-sensei, it's nothing…
…Shinpei-san. Please entrust me with full control of your body! Then I can take the pain…
But… that would mean Ryunosuke-san…!!.
It's fine! I'm a shadow after all. If I lower the volume of my pain senses, it'll be okay…
It's not just your legs. Your body is starting to break down…
If I don't support you from the inside, there's no way for Shinpei-san to survive here.
How about it? From now on, I'll be moving.
(This… am I just conscious?)
(Something feels weird…)
(My senses are numb, I can't feel anything… but my thoughts are clear…)
Even me usually feels like this. It's uncomfortable if you're not used to it…
(Yep, but I think I can handle this like how I do with the flu…)
(Then please take care of my body. First, let's find Ushio)
Right. We don't have time to waste…
Ushioooooo!! Respond please!!!
(Ryunosuke-san. Is this Hitogashima Island?)
It's similar… You can see the Kii Peninsula across the sea…
Also, there's a sweet smell… What is this…?
(Orange…?)
…If this is Mt. Takanosu, there shouldn't be so many orange trees…
My throat's dry…
(…No good!! Ryunosuke-san!!! This is the Yomotsuhigashi!)
Hah!
It's… not orange…!?

Ugh! ??
Fresh meat…
Yomotsuhigashi… It's in my sister's book, right?
(Yes!)

(…If you eat something from the other world, 
you can't return to this one…)
Something's wrong with me… I thought it looked delicious…

(No… since Ryunosuke-san is a shadow, 
there might be some influence…)
Um… Shinpei-san. I've wanted to say this for a while…
(What is it…)
You don't need to use honorifics with me!
(What?)
Because you're older than me, right?

(No no! Ryunosuke-san is the same age as Nagumo-sensei!
He's a senior!!)
No no no! I died in third year of middle school, and Ushio called me "Ryunkun" right away!!
(That's just because she has social skills…)

(I'm not into sports clubs, and besides,
as a junior I couldn't be too familiar…)
Do you use honorifics with everyone?

(Yes… 
With people my age, it's okay though)
Hey then… what about Mio? You used plain speech with her, right?
(It took a while for that too…)
Huh… I feel kinda jealous…
Then, from now on, I'll use plain speech!!
(What!?)

So Shinpei, it's okay to use plain speech too!! 
We're one body now so we should be close!
(This… is my respect, using honorifics…)

(Plain speech doesn't mean we're closer,
and being polite isn't distant either…)

No!! It's the form that matters!!! I'll use plain speech… 
Wait, it's already started!!.
(Ha ha… )
Something's wrong! ??
(No, I want to know more. About 'Ryunkun')
Really!?
(Wait… something's falling. That is!?)
…Ball?
(I've seen this before…)

(This is… the handball I saw in Nagumo-sensei's memory,
Heine's ball!!)
Ah! The handball…!!!
(There's no slope, but it rolls…)
(It seems like… something is pulling it…)
(Let's chase after it!!)
Understood!!.
(…Ryunosuke-san! Look at that sign!!)
This is… a store? A shop??
(A shop… Koyumiba)

No, it's the other way around! 
Kobayakawa… a store??
Hah!!
W-what are these people!??
(Shadows…?)
Don't know… but they don't seem to be attacking.
(The ball is rolling! It's close now… Ushio's presence!!)
…Ah!?
Ushio-san!!!!!
Ushio!!.
Pull yourself together!! What happened!?

Ugh… Shinpei… 
Ah… my head…
What's this!?? From Ushio's shadow…!!!?
This presence… Heine!!?

M-maybe…! 
Losing her self, trying to return as Heine!?
Gahhh…
…Right! My sister said it!!
Ushio's mud is torn from Heine… Even if overwritten with "Ushio", it was originally part of Heine!

When Ushio's self disappears, 
Heine could appear at any time…
At that point… I'll be the one to…!!.
…Shinpei, I'll shoot!!
Ughh… Aaaaaa!!!!!.

Shoot!! 
Okay!?
Wait, Ryunosuke-kun!!! It's saying something!!.

…Hah… Hah…
Okay… I'm fine.

…It's already okay now…
Ryunosuke!

This child isn't…
The bad Heine that killed Ryunosuke is not this one!
Huh!?
…What's going on?!

Back fourteen years ago…
Heine's self split apart.

It divided into a human girl named "Hoine"
and the one called "Hiruko."
The ones who killed Shiori-chan and Ushio aren't this child.
It was the "Hiruko" one that did it…!!
Then, right now Ushio-san's inside…

The girl who loves sweets.
Nagumo-sensei's friend.
…My older sister…

Yes, that's right.
And then…
This child is me…

Hoine wants to talk with you…
Will you listen…?
…Yes.
Thank you.
…Nice to meet you…
You're the one who…

Don't be scared!!
Everyone's Hizuru-san's friends!
…Hm…

I had a long dream.
That was Ushio's memory.
I think I understand what happened now…

Sorry, Shinpei… Ryunosuke…
Because of me getting involved with you guys…

Ryunosuke and Hizuru and Ushio too… 
Everyone's already dead.

It isn't your fault, though.  
The one who ate me was Hiruko,
and that's just what it is…
It's Shide using them for their own purposes…!!
Are you going to fight against Shide-sama?

This is 'Tokoyo'…
It's a world above our present one.

(…Above?
Like the fourth dimension…?)

Since I have a fragment of Hiruko-sama's memory…
There are things I can tell you.

In Tokoyo, time doesn't move forward.  
Shinpei… Ushio…
If it's the two of you, you'll be able to see it.
The stagnation in time…
Yeah…!!
Look at Ryunosuke with those eyes.

…Oh!!
Ryunosuke's body is off…

Really…
He's been talking normally since just now.
(This is Shide's plan…!!)

(…Since there's no before or after in time, loops are possible,
and even the 'next two seconds' don't exist!!)
It wants to steal Ushio's eyes here…

The one who has awakened those eyes,
will reach a dimension above the present world.

Once that happens, 
all time and space in this world will be at its mercy.
That's amazing!!

No way!?
It doesn't look like it can do anything at all!

(…Like how a 3D person could easily hold, flip,
or burn a 2D comic book…)

It seems unstable since it's just awakened…
And this is Tokoyo too.

Those eyes are normal here,
but they'll show their true power in the present world.
The ending…
Thoughts that came in when I scanned inside Shide.

It wants to kill the world,
like turning off a game's power switch with a 'click.'

After that, there'll be no more world…
The real… end…
What!?

…Th-That sound is…
"
